scripts.dev:python: cd apps/python-scraper && set PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8&& venv\Scripts\python.exe api.py
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:python"
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
